name: Ladder broke during work fall, can I sue the maker?

mainEntity.name: Ladder broke during work fall, can I sue the maker?

acceptedAnswer.description:
Yes, product liability claim against manufacturer for defective ladder, separate from comp.[2][6]

Proves design/sale defect caused fall; strict liability applies.[1]

- Preserve broken ladder.
- Expert inspection.
- Covers all damages.

Attorney files against seller too; high success if defect clear.[3]
